protocol.name: Sky
protocol.description: Sky enables users to get rewarded for non-custodial saving with USDS.

methodology.Fees: Stability fees charged on DAI/USDS loans, liquidation income from collateral auctions, and PSM (Peg Stability Module) fees from USDC/DAI conversions
methodology.Revenue: Fees collected minus savings rate paid to DSR depositors
methodology.ProtocolRevenue: Net protocol revenue after subtracting SKY token buybacks
methodology.HoldersRevenue: SKY token buybacks + staking rewards for sky stakers

Fees.Loans Stability Fees: Stability fees charged on DAI/USDS loans

Revenue.Loans Stability Fees: Stability fees charged on DAI/USDS loans minus savings rate paid to DSR depositors

SupplySideRevenue.Saving Module Cost (DSM): Savings rate paid to DSR depositors

HoldersRevenue.Token Buy Back: SKY tokens buy back from revenue
HoldersRevenue.USDS Staking Rewards: USDS rewards paid to SKY stakers

old_model_notes.source: session_search recovered prior IOSG SKY model; old files not present in workspace/tmp now
old_model_notes.denominator_prior: Implied annual GP around $181M-$186M from daily/30D revenue and DAI/USDS true TVL logic
